diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,165 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware, CreateHandlersInterface
+- Reads as: TypeScript interface definitions and class implementation
+- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/types
+- Safe summary: Factory helper provides handler creation utilities with generic typing for 1-10 handlers, creates App instances with optional initialization
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: Context utilities for routing information
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/request/constants, src/types, src/utils/url
+- Safe summary: Route helper functions that inspect matched routes and extract path information from the request context
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSContext, WSReadyState, defineWebSocketHelper
+- Reads as: TypeScript interfaces and class definitions for WebSocket handling
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types
+- Safe summary: WebSocket upgrade and context management, provides typed events and upgrade handler factory
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: Cookie parsing and serialization utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/cookie, src/context
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper exports functions to read signed/unsigned cookies and set/delete cookies with options for prefix and security attributes
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: Client type generation for testing
+- Neighbor files: src/client, src/client/types, src/context, src/hono, src/types, src/utils/types
+- Safe summary: Testing helper generates typed Hono client from app instance with optional execution context and environment bindings
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, Runtime, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents
+- Reads as: Runtime detection and environment accessor utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/context
+- Safe summary: Adapter helper detects runtime environment (node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly, edge-light, other) and provides typed environment access
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: createCssContext, css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, defaultContext
+- Reads as: CSS template tag and utility implementation
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html, src/jsx/constants, src/jsx/dom/css, src/utils/html, src/css/common
+- Safe summary: CSS helper provides template literal tags for styling with class name generation, keyframes, and view transitions
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, buildStyleString, minify, rawCssString, PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID
+- Reads as: CSS utility functions for processing style strings
+- Neighbor files: src/css
+- Safe summary: Common CSS utilities including minification, class name generation, hash computation, and string building for template literals
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: HTTP proxy fetch wrapper
+- Neighbor files: src/http-exception, src/utils/headers
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper forwards requests to external URLs with header filtering, hop-by-hop header removal, and optional strict RFC compliance
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: Route inspection utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/types, src/utils/color, src/utils/handler
+- Safe summary: Dev helper outputs formatted route listings with method, path, and handler names, supports optional verbose and colorize options
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: HTML template literal tag
+- Neighbor files: src/utils/html
+- Safe summary: HTML helper provides template literal tag with automatic escaping, supports mixed content and async rendering with callbacks
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, ssg, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
+- Reads as: Index re-exports
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG helper exports static site generation parameters, middleware, and plugins for static content pre-rendering
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, SSGPlugin, ToSSGOptions, ToSSGResult, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface
+- Reads as: Static site generation orchestration logic
+- Neighbor files: src/client/utils, src/hono, src/types, src/utils/concurrent, src/utils/mime, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: Core SSG implementation fetches routes, processes responses, saves files with configurable hooks and concurrency
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: Path manipulation utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/router, src/types, src/utils/handler
+- Safe summary: SSG path utilities for directory traversal, path joining, route filtering, and dynamic route detection
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY
+- Reads as: Middleware handlers for SSG context management
+- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG middleware sets context flags and headers to control static generation behavior per route, supports params injection
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText
+- Reads as: Index re-exports
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Safe summary: Streaming helper exports stream APIs for server-sent events and text streaming responses
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream
+- Reads as: Generic streami
